name: tpl-consulting-deliverable
description: Management Consultant (管理顧問) — fetch interview transcripts from project workspace, AI synthesize findings brief, AI build slide narrative outline, submit to client portal staging, alert engagement manager, delay 24h for review, conditionally publish or notify for revision. Replace workspace and client-portal externalUrl with your document system endpoints (e.g. SharePoint, Confluence, Box, Notion API).

steps.notifyMsg: Deliverable ready for review — {{deliverable_type}} for {{client_name}} (engagement {{engagement_id}}). Staging URL: {{steps.submit-to-staging.output.staging_url}}. Findings: {{steps.synthesize-findings.output.executive_summary}}. Slide outline: {{steps.build-slide-narrative.output.length}} slides. Review window: 24 hours. Approve or request revisions via the portal before the draft is published to the client.

Revision required for {{deliverable_type}} ({{client_name}}, engagement {{engagement_id}}). Review status: {{steps.submit-to-staging.output.review_status}}. Reviewer comments: {{steps.submit-to-staging.output.review_comments}}. Staging URL: {{steps.submit-to-staging.output.staging_url}}. Deliverable NOT published — please revise and resubmit. Re-run workflow or update staging draft directly.
